input.command: git log --oneline --all -- internal/server/state_runs_detail.go | head; echo ---; git show --stat 0b1b3964 | head -30

data.output:
0b1b3964 feat(server): run-detail resolver + tool-call persistence + bundle-file confinement [ddx-6d132f62]
---
commit 0b1b396470224e5f872052aba04e8d6f6f924e9a
Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sat May 2 10:11:13 2026 -0400

    feat(server): run-detail resolver + tool-call persistence + bundle-file confinement [ddx-6d132f62]
    
    Story 16.0: extend Run GraphQL with prompt/response/stderr/bundleFiles
    fields, plus runToolCalls(first, after) and runBundleFile(id, path) queries.
    
    Persist normalized ToolCallEntry at drain time onto SessionIndexEntry so
    resolver-time reads do not parse raw native logs. Bundle-file resolver
    canonicalises paths under projectRoot/.ddx/executions/runId/, rejects
    .., absolute, and symlink-escape inputs, and inlines content only for
    whitelisted small text files (manifest.json, prompt.md, result.json,
    *.txt, *.md, <64 KiB).
    
    Unit tests cover path traversal, symlink escape, size cap, whitelist
    enforcement, missing-path 404, and tool-call persistence at drain.

data.text: This bead's work was already implemented and merged in commit `0b1b3964` (originally bead ddx-6d132f62). All four ACs are satisfied by existing code in `internal/server/state_runs_detail.go` and tested in `internal/server/state_runs_detail_test.go`. I'll record a no_changes rationale with a verification command.

input.content:
Bead ddx-27936512 is a duplicate of work already merged in commit 0b1b3964
("feat(server): run-detail resolver + tool-call persistence + bundle-file
confinement [ddx-6d132f62]"). All four acceptance criteria are already
satisfied by existing code:

AC1: Run resolver returns full detail (lossless)
  - cli/internal/server/state_runs_detail.go:250 loadRunDetail() populates
    prompt/response/stderr from session bodies and bundleFiles via
    listRunBundleFiles(); invoked from state_runs.go:520 on run(id:) lookup.
  - cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_runs.go wires Run, RunToolCalls,
    RunBundleFile resolvers to the state methods.

AC2: ToolCallEntry persisted at drain time (NOT log-parsing)
  - agent.SessionIndexEntry carries a ToolCalls []ToolCallEntry field;
    SessionIndexEntryFromResult copies result.ToolCalls into the entry,
    so the persistence happens once at drain time rather than on each
    resolver call. GetRunToolCallsGraphQL reads only the persisted slice.

AC3: bundleFile endpoint refuses path traversal
  - resolveRunBundlePath (state_runs_detail.go:111) rejects absolute paths,
    "..", paths whose Clean escapes the root, and symlink targets that
    EvalSymlinks resolves outside bundleRoot. Surfaced via
    GetRunBundleFileGraphQL → Query.runBundleFile.

AC4: Tests cover all three
  - state_runs_detail_test.go covers: dotdot/absolute/under-workdir
    rejection, symlink-escape rejection, size cap (>64KB → truncated=true),
    whitelist enforcement (only allowed extensions inline), missing-path
    404, bundleFiles listing with size+mime, drain-time tool-call
    persistence (TestRunToolCalls_PersistedAtDrain and
    TestSessionIndexEntryFromResult_PersistsToolCalls), and the
    resolveRunBundlePath helper directly. All pass at base-rev b10e224f.

verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/ -run 'TestRunBundleFile|TestRunToolCalls|TestSessionIndexEntryFromResult|TestResolveRunBundlePath|TestRunBundleFiles_Listing' -count=1

data.text: No code changes needed — bead ddx-27936512 duplicates work already merged in commit `0b1b3964`. All four ACs are satisfied by existing code in `internal/server/state_runs_detail.go` and tested in `internal/server/state_runs_detail_test.go` (tests pass at the current base-rev). Recorded a rationale with a verification command at `.ddx/executions/20260503T061021-81cf614d/no_changes_rationale.txt`.
